payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE. Connect-to-a-remote from the UI: loopback POST /api/remote/projects (list for url+key) + /api/remote/connect (writes .scope/remote.json + machine-local key in ~/.scope-hub/credentials.json + starts the sync agent + probes) + /api/remote/disconnect; web modal with url+key -> project picker -> bind, plus Disconnect. CLI `scope remote set` still works. Verified disconnect/reconnect in test/local-client-pg.test.js.
